entry.text:
[b]Home commands allow you to create and manage your own personal teleport locations anywhere on the map.[/b] [b]Everyone can set one home per player, supporter get extra homes depending on their tier.[-]
[B6A67B]Creating your home location: [-] /HOME [B6A67B]NAME[-] ADD This will create home location named [B6A67B]NAME[-] at the location you were standing when executing command. Please note that name will be saved in lowercase, so [B6A67B]MYHOME[-], [B6A67B]Myhome[-], [B6A67B]MyHome[-] and etc - all will be saved as [B6A67B]myhome[-].
[B6A67B]Deleting your home location: [-] /HOME [B6A67B]NAME[-] DEL This will remove home location named [B6A67B]NAME[-]. You must use this if you wnat to "move" your home. Please note that letter case for the name does not matter. For example /HOME [B6A67B]MyHOME[-] DEL is same as /HOME [B6A67B]myhome[-] DEL
[B6A67B]Teleporting to your home location: [-] /HOME [B6A67B]NAME[-] This will teleport you to your named home location and create a [B6A67B]/return[-](see general commands) location. Please note that letter case for the name does not matter. For example /HOME [B6A67B]MyHOME[-] and /HOME [B6A67B]myhome[-] will teleport you to the same location.
